summary: Frontend testing for LP September P0 (Tier Coherence + Customer Quote + Frozen QR Share). BLOCKER encountered on first load: EstimateEditor threw 'LP_SECTION_TITLES is not defined' (ReferenceError) because the constant used in the new quoteEstimate memo was never imported. Added the missing import in /app/frontend/src/pages/EstimateEditor.jsx. After that fix: LP Material List panel renders (12 line(s) pricing pending, 38 Series Lap $30.99), tier flip via admin endpoint switches all UI surfaces from $30.99 to $33.37 and back (accordion + material list agree). Material List button freezes correctly (POST /api/estimates/{id}/lp-material-list/freeze -> 200 with token + share_path=/m/{token}) and downloads a PDF (20.7 KB). Public /m/{token} page (unauth) renders EST-910869-L, materials total $12,130.64, pricing-pending qualifiers present, no $0, no banner initially. After admin tier flip to whole-sale, /m/{token} shows amber 'Updated list available' banner while frozen prices stay at original 30.99 (drift protection works). Revoke endpoint returns {"revoked":true} and public page then shows material-share-error state. Public JSON at /api/public/lp-material-list/{token} redacts unit_cost, dealer_cost, and tier fields. Customer Quote PDF download succeeds (application/pdf, 19 KB, POST /api/estimates/{id}/pdf -> 200). Tier restored to Contractor at end. HOWEVER — CRITICAL FAIL on Customer Quote modal pending qualifiers (see backend_issues).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing `import { LP_SECTION_TITLES } from '@/lib/lpColors'`. New quoteEstimate memo referenced LP_SECTION_TITLES without importing it, causing a full-page ReferenceError overlay on every LP estimate open. FIXED in-place; verify main agent is OK with the import location.

Pending qualifiers ('pricing to be confirmed') do NOT render in the Customer Quote modal preview for any line, and no [data-testid=quote-pending-note] footnote appears. Root cause: quoteEstimate builds pkgLines only from sections in LP_SECTION_TITLES = {LP Smart Siding, LP SmartSide Trim, LP Siding Accessories, LP SmartSide Soffit}. All the pending lines returned by /api/estimates/{id}/lp-package/preview live in 'Seamless Gutter' and 'Misc. Labor and Material' sections (12 lines: Gutter 6", Downspout 6", elbow, End Cap, Hangars w/Screws, Pipe Clips, Gutter Sealant, Cap window, Cap entry door, Cap patio door, Cap single garage door). Those sections fall into `serviceLines` which are pulled from est.lines (accordion), which do NOT carry the pricing_pending flag. Result: Gutter 6" / Downspout / Cap window etc. all render in the modal WITHOUT the pending qualifier and their prices ARE included in the Total ($16,769.31 vs the LP-only $10,076.74).

Requirement says 'Total must NOT include pending lines' but Total Price shown in modal = $16,769.31, which includes the pending gutter section ($764.92) and misc labor lines from est.lines. calcTotals in /app/frontend/src/lib/calc.js has no awareness of pricing_pending — it sums everything.

integration_issues.issue: quoteEstimate must merge pending flags from pkg.lines for service sections (Seamless Gutter, Misc. Labor and Material, Tear-Off / Clean Up) — either widen LP_SECTION_TITLES to include those, OR merge the pkg's pricing_status into est.lines by (section, name) key so pending flags reach the QuoteModal + calcTotals.

action_items: P0: Propagate pricing_pending from pkg.lines into service sections in EstimateEditor.quoteEstimate (Seamless Gutter + Misc. Labor + Tear-Off). Simplest fix: after building base.lines, walk pkg.lines and for each (section, name) where pricing_status !== 'priced', set the matching est.lines entry's pricing_pending=true AND zero-out mat/lab so it drops out of totals; OR broaden LP_SECTION_TITLES and derive ALL package-tracked sections from pkg.lines.
P0: Exclude pricing_pending lines from calcTotals for quoteEstimate (either at the calc.js level with an option, or by zeroing mat/lab for pending lines in quoteEstimate).

P1: Verify pending qualifier also appears in the emailed HTML (/app/frontend/src/lib/emailQuote.js sectionBlock ~L150) and printed Customer Quote PDF — same root cause likely means both are missing pending badges/footnote.
P2: Confirm main agent wants the LP_SECTION_TITLES import placement at line 32 of EstimateEditor.jsx (already applied).
critical_code_review_comments: The ruled invariant 'pricing-pending never $0, never included in total' is not enforced end-to-end — it lives only in the pkg-derived material list surfaces (panel, /m share page). Customer Quote/Email/PDF violate it because the composition function drops the pkg's pricing_status for non-LP sections.

quoteEstimate silently falls back to est.lines when lpPkg is null. That's a hidden trap: opening Customer Quote before LpMaterialListPanel finishes its POST /lp-package/preview would produce a completely different quote. Consider gating the button or preloading pkg on estimate load.
LP_SECTION_TITLES lives in /app/frontend/src/lib/lpColors.js (odd file for a section-name set). Consider moving to /app/frontend/src/lib/lpSections.js for clarity.

The estimate editor's pending count on the panel (12) is authoritative but does not surface anywhere in the Customer Quote UX until the fix — customer PDF/email would then send a quote that claims to price gutters at contractor cost even though they are still 'pricing pending'.

success_rate.frontend: Tier Coherence PASS, Material List Freeze+QR PASS, /m/{token} page PASS, drift banner PASS, revoke PASS, redaction PASS, Quote PDF download PASS (200 application/pdf), Customer Quote pending qualifiers FAIL

seed_data_creation: None. Tier was flipped and restored to Contractor. Share token minted in the freeze test was subsequently revoked (revoke test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blocker fixed: LP_SECTION_TITLES import added to EstimateEditor.jsx. All backend-side flows (freeze/public/banner/revoke/redaction) confirmed working end-to-end from the browser. Remaining P0 is composition inside quoteEstimate: pending sections are Seamless Gutter + Misc. Labor and Material + Tear-Off (see pkg.lines above). Verify email HTML (emailQuote.js) after fix — same code path.
rca of the issue: Two bugs found. (1) ReferenceError: EstimateEditor referenced LP_SECTION_TITLES but never imported it — fixed with an import from '@/lib/lpColors'. (2) Customer Quote pending qualifier bug: quoteEstimate builds pkgLines only for the 4 LP material sections and merges est.lines for everything else. The pkg.lines returned by /api/estimates/{id}/lp-package/preview has 12 lines with pricing_status='pending' but they live in Seamless Gutter / Misc. Labor and Material sections. Because those are treated as 'contractor service lines' pulled from est.lines (which never carries pricing_pending), the pending flag is dropped before it reaches QuoteModal.jsx. Additionally calcTotals sums all lines regardless of pricing_pending. Fix: propagate pricing_status from pkg.lines into est.lines by matching (section, name) inside quoteEstimate, OR broaden LP_SECTION_TITLES and derive all pkg-tracked sections from pkg.lines instead of est.lines. Then treat pending lines as zero-cost in calcTotals (or exclude them).
